summary.intent: Add missing test coverage for a CRM gateway integration (CHA-15 branch), specifically covering the None crm_store panic safety path, CRM store error logging path, and empty sender_name fallback.
summary.outcome: Added 3 missing tests to crates/gateway/src/channel_events.rs, bringing CRM test coverage to 10/10. All 420 gateway tests pass with no warnings or clippy issues. Changes committed and pushed.

repo: Project uses a pinned nightly rustfmt — formatting must be applied with the pinned toolchain, not default rustfmt
style.css has a pre-existing compilation issue unrelated to gateway changes
Gateway crate has 420 total tests split across unit (359), auth (55), and integration (6) suites
CRM integration lives in crates/gateway/src/channel_events.rs with a crm_tests module
CrmStore is a trait in crates/crm/src/store.rs — mock implementations needed for error-path testing

code.finding: crm_store = None case must not panic; CRM store errors should be logged but must not block delivery; empty Some("") sender_name should fall back gracefully
CrmStore trait requires a mock FailingCrmStore implementation to test error propagation paths

workflow: Subagent diff analysis (7/9 codepaths covered) surfaced missing test cases before writing any code — effective pre-coding audit step
Run clippy and rustfmt as separate post-test steps before committing to catch style/warning issues
Check whether compilation errors are pre-existing vs. introduced before investigating them

friction: Pinned nightly rustfmt required a separate format-check step — not obvious from standard cargo fmt workflow
Unused import warning introduced by new test code required a follow-up edit after initial test run
open_items: Minor: empty sender_name string (Some("")) fallback behavior — transcript notes it was added but worth confirming the fallback value is correct per product spec
Pre-existing style.css compilation issue flagged but left unaddressed — should be tracked separately
